records.answer: Yes, Celtic Football Club shows strong evidence of actively reshaping its commercial and digital ecosystem through multiple initiatives in 2025. Key evidence includes: (1) Major adidas partnership extension announced May 1, 2025, described as 'landmark' with 'additional revenues of well over £30m anticipated'; (2) New Avant Water partnership as Official Water Partner; (3) Launch of Celtic Mobile, a dedicated mobile network service for supporters; (4) New official Celtic FC App developed with Urban Zoo; (5) Partnership with XS2Event for global fan access; (6) Eleven Sports Media partnership; (7) Active Community Partner Programme for regional businesses; (8) Existing partnerships with JD, EA Sports, Magners, Kellogg's, Coca-Cola, William Hill, and Fleet Alliance. The club is clearly investing in sponsorship extensions, new commercial partnerships, digital platforms (mobile app, mobile network), and fan engagement technologies.
